name: library-clearance-monitoring
description: Library Clearance Monitoring System - Dual App (Admin + Student)

scripts.dev:admin: cd admin-app && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:student: cd student-app && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.build:admin: cd admin-app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:student: cd student-app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:admin && npm run build:student
scripts.lint: npm run lint:admin && npm run lint:student
